title: Sabertools
description: Overpowered tools that make survival a bit easier! (More changes coming in the future!)
body:
# **_Description_**
This is a mod that adds a new sword to the game.  
You need 3 bones to craft a tooth, which is then used to craft a sword.
!!!More changes coming in the future!!!

## **_About the mod:_**
1.[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vWYpR3cdOq0&t=17s](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vWYpR3cdOq0&t=17s)
